detaileddescription.para: number of simulation steps
stepsize
Array storing components of E-Field
Array storing the Alfven tensor
Number of components for each MultiFab. Is 1 because the different field components are differently staggered
Default Constructor.

detaileddescription.para: Compute norm of errors of E and B field from function with exact solution

memberdef.definition: amrex::GpuArray<amrex::Real, edim + bdim> Gempic::Field_solvers::maxwell_yee< edim, bdim >::computeError
memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::Real(*function_to_project_E0)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), amrex::Real(*function_to_project_E1)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), amrex::Real(*function_to_project_E2)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), amrex::Real(*function_to_project_B0)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), amrex::Real(*function_to_project_B1)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), amrex::Real(*function_to_project_B2)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), bool bool_B, computational_domain ifr)
memberdef.name: computeError

detaileddescription.para: Compute norm of errors of E and B field from function with exact solution

memberdef.name: computeError

detaileddescription.para: Compute norm of errors of E and B field from function with exact solution

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::GpuArray< std::string, edim > fields_E, amrex::GpuArray< std::string, bdim > fields_B, amrex::Vector< amrex::Real > k, bool bool_B, computational_domain ifr)
memberdef.name: exactSolution

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::Real(*function_to_project_E0)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), amrex::Real(*function_to_project_E1)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), amrex::Real(*function_to_project_E2)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), amrex::Real(*function_to_project_B0)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), amrex::Real(*function_to_project_B1)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), amrex::Real(*function_to_project_B2)(amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real, amrex::Real), bool bool_B, computational_domain ifr)
memberdef.name: exactSolution

memberdef.argsstring: (bool bool_B, computational_domain ifr, amrex::GpuArray< int, edim > funcSelectE, amrex::GpuArray< int, bdim > funcSelectB)
memberdef.name: exactSolution

detaileddescription.para: Class storing all the field information (both analytical (E_sol_Array, B_sol_Array) and numerical (E_Array, B_Array, J_Array), infrastructure information for the fields (E_Index, B_Index, Nghost, Ncomp, time) and the necessary components to solve the Poisson problem for the first step (phi_init, rho, phi, sigma). In addition, the class can initialize the fields (init_E_B, ) and the functions for the Poisson problem (init_rho_phi), advance the complete problem (advance) or parts of it (advance_E, advance_B, advance_time), initialize E by solving the Poisson problem (solve_poisson), fill ghost cells of all relevant MultiFabs (FillBD), compute the analytical solution (exactSolution) and compute the error of the numerical solution (computeError).
